name: China Signature — Silk Road
title: China Signature — Silk Road
shortDescription: Journey through China's ancient trade route, from Urumqi to Xi'an, exploring desert oases, Buddhist grottoes and colourful Danxia mountains on this unforgettable Silk Road adventure.
highlights: Heavenly Lake (Tianchi) in Tianshan Mountains
Turpan ancient sites and Karez Irrigation System
Flaming Mountains and Bezeklik Thousand Buddha Caves
Mogao Caves in Dunhuang
Singing Sand Dunes and Crescent Lake
Jiayuguan Fortress and Hanging Great Wall
Zhangye Danxia colourful mountains
Bingling Temple Grottoes
Terracotta Warriors in Xi'an

itinerary.title: New Zealand — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Depart New Zealand, arrive Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Urumqi
itinerary.description: Arrive Urumqi, capital of Xinjiang. Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Urumqi — Heavenly Lake
itinerary.description: Visit Heavenly Lake (Tianchi) in Tianshan Mountains, enjoy alpine scenery.

itinerary.title: Urumqi — Turpan
itinerary.description: Visit Emin Minaret, Jiaohe Ancient City, and Karez Irrigation System.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Huozhou Turpan Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Turpan
itinerary.description: Explore the Flaming Mountains and Bezeklik Thousand Buddha Caves with ancient Buddhist murals.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Huozhou Turpan Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Turpan — Dunhuang
itinerary.description: High-speed train from Turpan North to Liuyuan. Coach transfer to Dunhuang.

itinerary.title: Dunhuang
itinerary.description: Visit Mogao Caves with Buddhist murals and statues. Experience the Singing Sand Dunes and Crescent Lake desert oasis.

itinerary.title: Dunhuang — Jiayuguan
itinerary.description: Visit the Hanging Great Wall and Jiayuguan Fortress, a Ming Dynasty masterpiece.

itinerary.title: Jiayuguan — Zhangye
itinerary.description: Visit Zhangye Danxia National Geological Park with its stunning colourful layered mountains.

itinerary.title: Zhangye — Wuwei
itinerary.description: Visit Leitai Han Tomb and Confucian Temple.

itinerary.title: Wuwei — Lanzhou
itinerary.description: Travel the Yellow River Scenic Route to Lanzhou.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Lanzhou Jianlan or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Lanzhou — Bingling Temple
itinerary.description: Boat trip to Bingling Temple Grottoes, featuring 1,700 years of Buddhist art in cliffside caves.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Lanzhou Jianlan or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Lanzhou — Xi'an
itinerary.description: High-speed train from Lanzhou West to Xi'an North. Rest upon arrival.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Bell Tower Xi'an or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Visit the Terracotta Army and Giant Wild Goose Pagoda.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Bell Tower Xi'an or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Free Day
itinerary.description: Free day to explore Xi'an on your own.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Bell Tower Xi'an or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Flight to Shanghai, prepare for return journey.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — New Zealand
itinerary.description: Depart China, return to New Zealand.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Signature — Imperial Heritage
title: China Signature — Imperial Heritage
shortDescription: Experience the highlights of Beijing and Xi'an in this immersive tour, from the Great Wall and Forbidden City to the Terracotta Warriors, Lhasa, Yangtze River cruise, and Shanghai.
highlights: Great Wall and Forbidden City in Beijing
Terracotta Warriors in Xi'an
Potala Palace and Tibetan Buddhist temples in Lhasa
Yangtze River Three Gorges cruise on 5-star vessel
Giant pandas at Chengdu Breeding Base
Traditional performances and banquets
Shanghai classical gardens and Bund

itinerary.title: Auckland — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Evening flight to Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Beijing
itinerary.description: Arrive Shanghai, connect flight to Beijing. Free time depending on arrival.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Visit Tiananmen Square, Forbidden City, and Temple of Heaven. Evening Peking duck banquet and Chinese acrobatic show.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Great Wall experience, jade factory visit, and Summer Palace tour.

itinerary.title: Beijing — Xi'an
itinerary.description: High-speed train to Xi'an. Explore Muslim Quarter. Evening dumpling banquet and Tang Dynasty dance performance.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure on Bell Tower or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Visit Terracotta Warriors, ceramics and lacquerware workshop, and City Wall.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure on Bell Tower or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Lhasa
itinerary.description: Flight from Xi'an to Lhasa. Free time to adjust to altitude.

itinerary.title: Lhasa
itinerary.description: Visit Jokhang Temple, Barkhor Street, and Sera Monastery to watch the debating monks.

itinerary.title: Lhasa
itinerary.description: Tour Potala Palace, Norbulingka, and Tibetan arts workshop. Evening Tibetan dinner with folk music and dance.

itinerary.title: Lhasa — Chengdu
itinerary.description: Free time to explore Lhasa. Flight to Chengdu.

itinerary.title: Chengdu — Chongqing (Yangtze Cruise)
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Chengdu Panda Breeding Base. Afternoon high-speed train to Chongqing. Board Yangtze cruise ship.
itinerary.accommodation: MV Century Paragon or Goddess No.2/3 (5-star cruise)

itinerary.title: Yangtze River Cruise
itinerary.description: Sail through the Three Gorges with shore excursions.
itinerary.accommodation: MV Century Paragon or Goddess No.2/3 (5-star cruise)

itinerary.title: Yangtze River Cruise
itinerary.description: Continue sailing through the Three Gorges. Shore excursion to Shennv Stream or Shennong Stream.
itinerary.accommodation: MV Century Paragon or Goddess No.2/3 (5-star cruise)

itinerary.title: Three Gorges Dam — Yichang — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Disembark and visit the Three Gorges Dam. Transfer to Yichang for evening flight to Shanghai.
itinerary.accommodation: Shanghai Regal Jinfeng Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: Visit Yuyuan Garden, silk factory, and The Bund. Evening Huangpu River night cruise and Shanghai-style dinner.
itinerary.accommodation: Shanghai Regal Jinfeng Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Auckland
itinerary.description: Free time. Transfer to airport for return flight.

itinerary.title: Arrive Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive in Auckland. Tour ends.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach, second-class train, and domestic flights
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Signature — Grand Tour
title: China Signature — Grand Tour
shortDescription: See China in full colour on this 27-day grand tour. From the Great Wall and Terracotta Warriors to a Yangtze River cruise, pandas in Chengdu, and the scenic beauty of Guilin, Hangzhou, and Suzhou.
highlights: Great Wall and Forbidden City in Beijing
Terracotta Warriors in Xi'an
5-star Yangtze River cruise through Three Gorges
Pandas at Chengdu Breeding Base
Dali, Erhai Lake, and Yunnan's beauty
Li River cruise to Yangshuo in Guilin
West Lake and tea plantations in Hangzhou
Suzhou classical gardens and Grand Canal
Shanghai's Bund and acrobatic show

itinerary.title: Auckland — China
itinerary.description: Flight to China.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Arrive Shanghai, connect to Beijing. Free time.
itinerary.accommodation: Wanda Meihua Hotel Dongba or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Tiananmen Square, Forbidden City, Hutong family visit. Peking duck dinner.
itinerary.accommodation: Wanda Meihua Hotel Dongba or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Great Wall at Juyongguan, jade carving factory, Summer Palace.
itinerary.accommodation: Wanda Meihua Hotel Dongba or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Beijing — Xi'an
itinerary.description: Temple of Heaven, morning Tai Chi. High-speed train to Xi'an. Dumpling banquet dinner.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Bell Tower Hotel Xi'an or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Small Wild Goose Pagoda, Muslim Quarter, City Wall.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Bell Tower Hotel Xi'an or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Full day visiting Terracotta Warriors Museum.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Bell Tower Hotel Xi'an or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Yichang — Yangtze Cruise
itinerary.description: Flight to Yichang, board 5-star Yangtze cruise.

itinerary.title: Yangtze River Cruise
itinerary.description: Three Gorges scenery and shore excursions.

itinerary.title: Yangtze River Cruise
itinerary.description: Continue Three Gorges cruise with Shennv/Shennong Stream excursion.

itinerary.title: Yangtze River Cruise
itinerary.description: Final day of the Three Gorges cruise.

itinerary.title: Chongqing — Chengdu
itinerary.description: Disembark. Ciqikou Ancient Town. High-speed train to Chengdu. Sichuan dinner.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Chengdu Gulou or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Chengdu — Dali
itinerary.description: Panda Breeding Base, People's Park, Wide & Narrow Alleys, Taikoo Li. Evening flight to Dali.
itinerary.accommodation: Dali Shuiyun Academy Hotel or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Dali
itinerary.description: Xizhou Village market, Yan's Courtyard, Erhai Lake cruise, Three Pagodas.
itinerary.accommodation: Dali Shuiyun Academy Hotel or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Dali — Kunming
itinerary.description: Dali Ancient Town exploration. Transfer to Kunming.

itinerary.title: Kunming
itinerary.description: Stone Forest (karst formations). Crossing-the-bridge rice noodles dinner.

itinerary.title: Kunming — Guilin
itinerary.description: Flight to Guilin.

itinerary.title: Li River Cruise — Yangshuo
itinerary.description: Li River cruise to Yangshuo through karst mountain scenery.
itinerary.accommodation: Rezen Hotel West Street Yangshuo or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Yangshuo
itinerary.description: Morning Tai Chi, countryside tour, cormorant fishing. Free afternoon.
itinerary.accommodation: Rezen Hotel West Street Yangshuo or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Yangshuo — Guilin
itinerary.description: Elephant Trunk Hill, Reed Flute Cave, Sun & Moon Pagodas.

itinerary.title: Guilin — Hangzhou
itinerary.description: Flight to Hangzhou. West Lake cruise, Hubin District.

itinerary.title: Hangzhou — Suzhou
itinerary.description: Lingyin Temple, Meijiawu Tea Plantation, Xinshi Ancient Town with Hanfu dress-up. Transfer to Suzhou.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Suzhou Bay or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Suzhou
itinerary.description: Humble Administrator's Garden, Grand Canal boat ride.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Suzhou Bay or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Suzhou — Shanghai
itinerary.description: People's Square, Shanghai Museum. Huangpu River cruise.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Shanghai Fangta or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: Yuyuan Garden, The Bund, silk factory. Evening ERA Acrobatic Show.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Shanghai Fangta or similar 4-star

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Auckland
itinerary.description: Free time. Evening airport transfer, return flight.

itinerary.title: Arrive Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive Auckland. Tour ends.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach, second-class train, and domestic flights
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Signature — Yunnan
title: China Signature — Yunnan
shortDescription: Uncover the natural beauty and rich culture of southwest China, from the serene lakes of Dali and ancient towns of Lijiang to the dramatic Tiger Leaping Gorge and mystical Shangri-La.
highlights: Erhai Lake and Santorini-style views in Dali
Shuanglang Ancient Town and Bai ethnic culture
Lijiang's ancient town and Sifang Street
Lashi Lake Wetland and Shuhe Ancient Town
Tiger Leaping Gorge — one of the deepest canyons
Dukezong Ancient City in Shangri-La
World's largest prayer wheel
Ganden Sumtseling Monastery

itinerary.title: Auckland — Beijing/Shanghai
itinerary.description: Flight to Beijing/Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Beijing/Shanghai — Dali
itinerary.description: Arrive, city tour (798 Art District). Lunch. Flight to Dali. Dinner on arrival.

itinerary.title: Dali
itinerary.description: Erhai Park, Dali Ideal State (Santorini views of Cangshan Mountain and Erhai Lake). Wenbi Village with Bai ethnic buildings. Shuanglang Ancient Town.

itinerary.title: Dali — Free Day
itinerary.description: Free day or optional Haixi Line tour: Dali Ancient City, Erhai Ecological Corridor, Xizhou Ancient Town, Three-course Tea ceremony, Bai ethnic meal.

itinerary.title: Dali — Lijiang
itinerary.description: Transfer to Lijiang. Visit Black Dragon Pool Park, Highland Dulong Jade, and Sifang Street ancient city.

itinerary.title: Lijiang
itinerary.description: Lashi Lake Wetland with migratory birds. Silk Bedding Exhibition Hall. Shuhe Ancient Town along the ancient Tea Horse Road.

itinerary.title: Lijiang — Shangri-La
itinerary.description: Visit Dukezong Ancient City, Moonlight Square, and the world's largest prayer wheel. Tiger Leaping Gorge with Tiger Leaping Stone. Guishan Park.

itinerary.title: Shangri-La — Lijiang
itinerary.description: Visit Ganden Sumtseling Monastery ('Little Potala Palace'). Napa Lake Wetlands and Highland Barley Avenue. Return to Lijiang.

itinerary.title: Lijiang — Free Day
itinerary.description: Free day or optional tour to ancient Naxi village with Dongba pictographs, Naxi Museum, Yuzhu Qingtian Scenic Area.

itinerary.title: Lijiang — Beijing/Shanghai
itinerary.description: Flight to Beijing/Shanghai. Wangfujing Street shopping. Gather for airport departure.

itinerary.title: Beijing/Shanghai — Auckland
itinerary.description: Return flight to Auckland.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and domestic flights
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Signature — Landscapes
title: China Signature — Landscapes
shortDescription: Discover China's most iconic natural sights, from the pandas of Chengdu to the misty peaks of Zhangjiajie, Li River cruises, water towns, and dynamic Shanghai.
highlights: Giant Pandas at Chengdu Breeding & Research Base
Leshan Giant Buddha
Zhangjiajie Tianmen Mountain with glass skywalk
Zhangjiajie National Forest Park and Bailong Elevator
Li River cruise from Guilin to Yangshuo
Reed Flute Cave and Elephant Trunk Hill
Fenghuang and Furong ancient towns
Shanghai's Bund and Huangpu River cruise
Zhujiajiao Ancient Water Town

itinerary.title: Auckland — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Evening flight to Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: Arrive morning. City God Temple, Yu Garden, Nanjing Road, The Bund, Xintiandi, Tianzifang with Shikumen architecture.
itinerary.accommodation: Shanghai Jin Jiang Metropolo Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: Jade Buddha Temple, Oriental Pearl TV Tower, Shanghai Museum East Hall. Evening Huangpu River night cruise.
itinerary.accommodation: Shanghai Jin Jiang Metropolo Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Guilin
itinerary.description: Morning flight to Guilin. Visit Elephant Trunk Hill Park.

itinerary.title: Guilin — Yangshuo
itinerary.description: 4-star Li River cruise to Yangshuo with onboard guide. Stroll West Street.
itinerary.accommodation: Yangshuo West Street Rezen Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Yangshuo — Guilin
itinerary.description: Free morning. Afternoon visit Reed Flute Cave and Jingjiang Princes' City.

itinerary.title: Guilin — Chengdu
itinerary.description: High-speed train to Chengdu. Dinner on arrival.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Chengdu Gulou or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Chengdu
itinerary.description: Panda Breeding & Research Base, People's Park (tea), Taikoo Li, Kuanzhai Alley. Optional: Sichuan Opera face-changing.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Chengdu Gulou or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Chengdu
itinerary.description: Full day visiting Leshan Giant Buddha and Huanglongxi Ancient Town.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Express Chengdu Gulou or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Chengdu — Fenghuang
itinerary.description: High-speed train to Huaihua. Night view of Fenghuang Ancient Town.
itinerary.accommodation: Fengming Tianxia International Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Fenghuang — Zhangjiajie
itinerary.description: Tour Fenghuang Ancient Town. Visit Furong Town. Proceed to Zhangjiajie.
itinerary.accommodation: Zhangjiajie Dongyue Xinyue Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Zhangjiajie — Wulingyuan
itinerary.description: Tianmen Mountain: cable car, eco shuttle, escalator at Tianmen Cave, glass skywalk, Guigu plank path. Tujia Folk Customs Park.

itinerary.title: Wulingyuan
itinerary.description: Zhangjiajie National Forest Park: Bailong Elevator up, Tianzi Mountain cableway down. Yuanjiajie, Western Sea, Hallelujah Mountain, Ten-mile Gallery.

itinerary.title: Zhangjiajie — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Golden Whip Stream, Zhangjiajie Grand Canyon, Glass Bridge. Evening flight to Shanghai.
itinerary.accommodation: Shanghai Jin Jiang Metropolo Hotel or equivalent 4-star

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Zhujiajiao
itinerary.description: Full-day visit to Zhujiajiao Ancient Water Town. Return to Shanghai, dinner, transfer to airport.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Auckland
itinerary.description: Return flight to Auckland.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach, second-class train, and domestic flights
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Signature — Shangri-la
title: China Signature — Shangri-la
shortDescription: An immersive 8-day journey exploring breathtaking landscapes and vibrant cultures of Yunnan, from Kunming's Stone Forest through Dali and Lijiang to the mystical Shangri-La region.
highlights: Kunming Stone Forest — highest karst terrain in the world
Dali's Erhai Lake and Bai village Xizhou
Three Pagodas of Chongsheng Temple
Lijiang's Dayan Old Town (UNESCO World Heritage)
Jade Dragon Snow Mountain and Yak Meadow
Blue Moon Valley
Tiger Leaping Gorge
Dukezong Old Town in Shangri-La
Potatso National Park with Bitahai and Shuduhu Lakes

itinerary.title: Kunming
itinerary.description: Arrival in Kunming, 'City of Perpetual Spring'. Hotel transfer.

itinerary.title: Kunming
itinerary.description: Visit Stone Forest, the highest karst terrain in the world. Afternoon return with optional visits to old town or Flower and Bird Market.

itinerary.title: Kunming — Dali
itinerary.description: Bullet train to Dali. Boat trip on Erhai Lake, visit Bai village Xizhou, photo stop at Three Pagodas of Chongsheng Temple, explore Dali Old Town.

itinerary.title: Dali — Lijiang
itinerary.description: Coach to Lijiang with countryside views. Visit Black Dragon Pool Park and Dongba Culture Museum. Evening walk through Dayan Old Town (UNESCO World Heritage).

itinerary.title: Lijiang
itinerary.description: Visit Jade Dragon Snow Mountain National Park (3,000m elevation). Chairlift to Yak Meadow. Blue Moon Valley tour. Baisha Village ancient frescoes.

itinerary.title: Lijiang — Shangri-La
itinerary.description: 250km drive passing Shigu County, First Bend of Yangtze River, and Tiger Leaping Gorge. Visit Old Town of Dukezong.

itinerary.title: Shangri-La
itinerary.description: Morning visit Potatso National Park with Bitahai and Shuduhu Lakes. Afternoon visit Napahai with yaks and black-necked cranes.

itinerary.title: Shangri-La — Kunming
itinerary.description: Morning flight to Kunming. Tour concludes.

inclusions: Admission to all sightseeing locations per itinerary
